# Repository Orientation for LLMs

This repository follows standard project layout guidelines:
- Documentation files: README.md, TODO.md, CHANGELOG.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md.
- Configuration: .editorconfig, .gitattributes, .prettierrc, .markdownlint.json, cspell.json.
- Workflows: .github/workflows for CI/CD, linting, formatting, secret scanning, and run cleanup.
- Language standard: en-GB spelling enforced in cspell.json with alphabetically sorted custom words.
